description_long: This shotgun features a striking, custom-painted exterior with a vibrant mix of teal, purple, and tan colors, adorned with stylized graphics resembling a dragon or serpent motif along the receiver and barrel. The weapon has a robust, cylindrical double-barrel configuration, with both barrels aligned horizontally and venting holes visible along the top. The grip is ergonomically shaped and color-matched to the rest of the body, while the stock is a minimalist folding design with a tan buttplate and blue struts. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall build suggests a modern tactical shotgun, with visible screws, rails, and a prominent front sight.
description: A vividly painted, double-barrel tactical shotgun with a dragon motif, folding stock, and ergonomic grip. The design features bold teal, purple, and tan colors with detailed surface graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular double-barrel muzzle, venting holes, and the dragon motif running along the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrels, the dragon artwork, ergonomic grip, and folding stock structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the folding stock's tan buttplate and the alignment of the barrels and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mirrored dragon motif, grip details, and the folding stock from the opposite side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with venting holes along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
